title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cognizant - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cognizant - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant:
Cognizant is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant!
